  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has occurred, resulting in a blown/purged lip seal."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop lubrication work immediately.",
    "Remove the damaged seal and inspect the bearing cavity for excess grease.",
    "Clean out excess grease to meet manufacturer-specified fill volume (typically 30-50% free space).",
    "Install a new, undamaged replacement seal.",
    "Re-verify proper lubrication volume using SKF/Timken mounting and maintenance guides before commissioning."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing has blown past the seal lip, compromising the seal's integrity and risking premature bearing failure due to heat buildup and contaminant ingress. The work must be halted, the damaged seal replaced, and the grease level corrected before the assembly can be accepted.",

    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual - Lubrication Section"
  ]
